title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, February 22 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 22/02/2022
Image reference: 2022-02-22_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-february-22-2022_img1.png
Tanker: Mid-age Suezmax values have firmed. Suezmax Rineia (159,100 DWT, Mar 2004, Hyundai Heavy Ind) sold to Middle Eastern buyers for USD 18.20 mil, VV value USD 17.05 mil - DD Due. LR2 Orange Stars (115,800 DWT, Sep 2011, Samsung) sold to Norwegian buyers for USD 28.00 mil, VV value USD 28.04 mil - Inc Charter.
